> Template — seeds stub nodes for Flutter / Mekari Pixel design system components.
> Each ## section → one ChromaDB node. Stubs are overwritten when real catalog is seeded from flutter-mekari-pixel-catalog.md.

## Atoms
### Theory
_Stub — smallest building blocks: buttons, inputs, icons, badges, chips._
### Definition
_Stub — component list with prop summary._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — canonical atom usage examples._

## Components
### Theory
_Stub — composed UI components built from atoms: cards, lists, dialogs, navigation bars._
### Definition
_Stub — component list with prop summary._
### Code Pattern
_Stub — canonical component usage examples._

## Templates
### Theory
_Stub — full-page layout templates: empty state, error state, loading skeleton._

_Stub — template list with slot summary._

_Stub — canonical template usage._

## Pages
